immersivemodularbackpacks:handbook-backp:
This backpack can be fitted with addons - pouches, tool straps and other small gear - that expand what it carries and ride along on your back.

To fit an addon, set the backpack down on the ground, then hold the addon and sneak + rightmouse-click one of its attachment points. rightmouse-click the backpack to open its cargo, or sneak + rightmouse-click an occupied point to take an addon back off.

Break the backpack to pick it up again - its addons and their contents come with it - then wear it as usual.
immersivemodularbackpacks:handbook-addon:
A pouch is a small bag in its own right - slot it into one of your character's bag slots and it holds items like any other bag. A sturdy pouch holds more than a plain one.

It can also be fitted to a backpack as an addon: set the backpack down, hold the pouch and sneak + rightmouse-click a free attachment point. Its slots then join the backpack's cargo.

A tool strap carries a single tool. Slot it into one of your character's bag slots to use it on its own.

It can also be fitted to a backpack as an addon: set the backpack down, hold the strap and sneak + rightmouse-click a free attachment point. Fitted this way, the tool it holds rides visibly on your back.
